description: Pattern Group Inc. operates as an e-commerce accelerator that combines proprietary technology and on-demand expertise to support consumer brands operating across e-commerce marketplaces in the United States and internationally. The company acquires inventory from brand partners to sell to consumers in various industries, including health and wellness; beauty and personal care; home and lifestyle; pet; sports and outdoors; and consumer electronics.
